allow: PowerShell(docker exec bookingsystem-postgres psql -U postgres -d bookingsystem -c "\\dt" 2>&1)

PowerShell(docker exec bookingsystem-postgres psql -U postgres -d bookingsystem -c "SELECT column_name, data_type, is_nullable FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name IN \('bookings','services','staff'\) AND column_name IN \('status','buffer_position','role','staff_id','deleted_at','metadata','buffer_enabled','buffer_minutes'\) ORDER BY table_name, column_name;" 2>&1)

PowerShell(docker exec bookingsystem-postgres psql -U postgres -d bookingsystem -c "SELECT table_name, column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE \(column_name='metadata' OR column_name='day_of_week'\) AND table_schema='public' ORDER BY table_name;" 2>&1)
